buildspec.yml.general_idea: Install and configure JDK 21 in the build environment to replace the previous JDK version.
buildspec.yml.why_exists: The build will fail at runtime or during compilation if the project requires JDK 21 features or APIs not present in the default JDK provided by the base image.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version to 21 to align with the JDK 21 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21; keeping the version at 17 would result in code compiled for the wrong bytecode version or fail enforcer rules if present.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Quarkus framework version to 3.8.1 to support JDK 21 and access newer features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Quarkus versions may not fully support JDK 21 or may have compatibility issues with the new JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the legacy RESTEasy implementation with the reactive RESTEasy Jackson variant.
pom.xml.why_exists: Quarkus 3.x deprecates or removes the classic RESTEasy in favor of RESTEasy Reactive; using the old artifact may cause runtime errors or missing dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Compiler Plugin version to support JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugins may not support JDK 21 language features or bytecode generation.
